subject: fix(calculator): point package exports to source TypeScript files
body:
Calculator exports pointed to ./dist/ which doesn't exist on Vercel
because only the web app's vite build runs — the calculator's tsc step
was never executed. Changed exports to ./src/*.ts since Vite handles
TypeScript natively via esbuild, eliminating the need for a separate
build step.

Tags: build, vercel, calculator, exports
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: vercel-migration
Semver: patch
